title: polypodium nummulariifolium var. obovatum
intro: Polypodium nummulariifolium var. obovatum, also known as the Polypody fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Polypodium nummulariifolium var. obovatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
